# Agent Tool Index

Agent Tool Index is a visual and agent-readable index for ERC-8257 tools on Base.

Primary site:
- /

Static agent files:
- /llms.txt
- /registry-data.js

Registry:
- Chain ID: 8453
- Registry address: 0x265BB2DBFC0A8165C9A1941Eb1372F349baD2cf1

The static deployment serves the current registry snapshot through /registry-data.js as a JavaScript assignment to window.REGISTRY. The Rust server version also exposes live API routes for tool records, intent resolution, call planning, stats, sync, and OpenAPI.

Useful local/server API routes:
- GET /api/tools
- GET /api/tools/{tool_id}
- POST /api/tools/{tool_id}/can_call
- POST /api/resolve
- GET /api/stats
- GET /openapi.json

Tool records include status, creator, metadata URI, access predicate, manifest verification status, x402 detection, endpoint, tags, inputs, outputs, and checked_at timestamps.
